title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates:
Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Razorpay Asia Pacific Associates!
